title: I LUNG NUAM HI, ZEISU MUANG LEENG

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I lung nuam hi Zeisu muang leeng
Ama hong gen bang um leeng
Ama hong thuciamna muang leeng
Topa' hong cihna thei leeng

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zeisu, Zeisu ke'n ka muang hi
A muanhuai na thei zo ing
Zeisu, Zeisu manpha Zeisu
Amah muang semsem nuam ing

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I lung nuam hi Zeisu muang leeng
Hong sapna Asi muang leeng
Hong dam hong siang sak thei Asi
Sungah upna tawh bual leeng

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I lung nuam hi Zeisu muang leeng
Mawhna pumpi nusia leeng
Nuntak lungnop tawldam nuamna
Zeisu khut tung pan sang leeng

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Zeisu kong muan theih ka nuam hi
A manpha lawmpa Na hi
Hong Honpa aw a tawp dong in
Nong ompih ding ka thei hi
